summary: Iteration 34: Tested 3 new features - (1) Processor ID column in Admin Orders & Subscriptions tables, (2) Articles page using TopNav directly (no AppShell, no product category tabs), (3) Backend processor_id saved on payment confirmation. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified.

issues: Persistent console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - caused by Emergent framework VE wrapper, not application code. Non-blocking. Carried from previous iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: checkout.py: processor_id=session_id saved on order/subscription via checkout/status/{session_id} ✓
gocardless.py: processor_id=mandate_id saved on complete_redirect for both orders and subscriptions ✓
OrdersTab.tsx: Processor ID TableHead + TableCell with data-testid after Sub # ✓
SubscriptionsTab.tsx: Processor ID TableHead + TableCell with fallback chain (processor_id || stripe_subscription_id || gocardless_mandate_id) ✓
Articles.tsx: Uses TopNav directly, no AppShell, no CategoryTabs - product category tabs completely removed ✓
Note: Articles page still correctly shows article-level category filters (All/Blog/Scope - Final Won)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested 3 new features. Key results: (1) Admin Orders table: headers=['Date', 'Order #', 'Customer', 'Email', 'Product(s)', 'Sub #', 'Processor ID', 'Subtotal', 'Fee', 'Total', 'Pay Date', 'Method', 'Status', 'Actions'], Processor ID at index 6, data-testid=admin-order-processor-{id}, shows '—' for null. (2) Admin Subscriptions table: headers=[..., 'Sub #', 'Processor ID', 'Customer Email', ...], Processor ID at index 2, data-testid=admin-sub-processor-{id}, fallback chain: processor_id||stripe_subscription_id||gocardless_mandate_id, shows '—' for null. (3) Articles page at /articles: uses TopNav directly, NO product category tabs (Zoho Express Setup, Migrate to Zoho, Managed Services all absent), shows article category filters (All/Blog/Scope - Final Won), pagination shows Showing 1-9 of 33 articles, Page 1 of 4.
